wide_chords.text: ⟦⟦ W̃ĩd̃ẽ s̃p̃ãñ c̃h̃õr̃d̃s̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽ l̃ãr̃g̃ẽ h̃ãñd̃ m̃õṽẽm̃ẽñt̃s̃. ⟧⟧

dense_chords.text: ⟦⟦ C̃h̃õr̃d̃s̃ ãp̃p̃ẽãr̃ f̃r̃ẽq̃ũẽñt̃l̃ỹ ĩñ t̃ĩg̃h̃t̃ s̃ẽq̃ũẽñc̃ẽs̃. ⟧⟧

high_coordination.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ĩs̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽs̃ c̃õõr̃d̃ĩñãt̃ẽd̃ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃ ãc̃r̃õs̃s̃ l̃ãñẽs̃. ⟧⟧
